doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: Rule 5.5 exists and captures genuine ABA structure, but subsection (b)'s specific paralegal restrictions and subsection (c)'s claims about state sanctions lack verification against the actual Model Rule text.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: Rule 5.5 exists and the document captures genuine ABA content, but subsection (b)'s detailed specifications about paralegal activities and subsection (c)'s specific claims about "no emergency exception" and named state sanctions appear fabricated or significantly embellished beyond the actual Model Rule language.
